moments.title: World Cup Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing across North America, featuring 48 teams in an expanded format, running until July 19.

angles.name: General Update
angles.copy: Who's making headlines at the #FIFAWorldCup2026? The expanded tournament is heating up across North America, with matches running until July 19. Keep up with all the action!

angles.name: UK Perspective
angles.copy: Waking up to more World Cup drama? The 2026 FIFA World Cup is well underway, bringing global football action every day until July 19.

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 begin tomorrow, June 29, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries, cream, and incredible tennis! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches tomorrow. Who are you backing for the titles?

angles.name: London Event
angles.copy: London's ready for two weeks of world-class tennis as Wimbledon 2026 starts tomorrow. The iconic tournament runs at the All England Club until July 12.

moments.title: Tour de France Starts
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins on July 4 in Barcelona, promising 21 stages of gruelling cycling until July 26.

angles.name: Race Start
angles.copy: Next week, the world's greatest cycling race begins! The Tour de France 2026 kicks off in Barcelona on July 4. Who's your favourite for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Upcoming Action
angles.copy: Get ready for a month of intense cycling! The Tour de France starts July 4th, with 21 stages of incredible action.

moments.title: Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted in England since June 12, concludes with the final on July 5.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It's almost time for the final! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted in England, reaches its climax on July 5. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Home Soil Advantage
angles.copy: The Women's T20 World Cup final is just days away, right here in England! Will the home crowd inspire a new champion on July 5?

moments.title: UEFA U19 Championship in Wales
moments.blurb: The UEFA European Under-19 Championship kicks off today, June 28, and runs until July 11, with matches hosted across Wales.

angles.name: Wales Hosts
angles.copy: Football fever hits Wales! The UEFA European Under-19 Championship starts today, with young talent battling it out across the nation until July 11. Come on Cymru!

angles.name: Local Football
angles.copy: Exciting football action starts today as Wales hosts the UEFA U19 Championship! Cheer on the future stars of European football right here on our doorstep.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival is underway until July 4, featuring Alanis Morissette (June 28), Teddy Swims (June 30), Katy Perry (July 1), and Michael Bublé (July 4).

angles.name: Tonight's Gig
angles.copy: Alanis Morissette takes to the stage at Blenheim Palace Festival tonight! Who's heading to Blenheim for a dose of 90s rock nostalgia?

angles.name: Week of Stars
angles.copy: What a week at Blenheim Palace! With Alanis Morissette (tonight), Teddy Swims (June 30), Katy Perry (July 1), and Michael Bublé (July 4) all performing, it's a star-studded line-up.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is number one on the Official UK Singles Chart for a 14th non-consecutive week, as of the chart published June 26.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds strong for a 14th non-consecutive week on the Official UK Singles Chart. What a run!

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are making history! 'Rein Me In' is smashing records with its 14th week at UK number one. Have you streamed it today?

moments.title: Mel Brooks' 100th on BBC Four
moments.blurb: BBC Four celebrates comedy legend Mel Brooks' 100th birthday today, June 28, with a showing of his Oscar-winning film 'The Producers'.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 100th Birthday to the one and only Mel Brooks! Celebrate with BBC Four tonight as they show his classic film 'The Producers'. Comedy gold!

angles.name: Timeless Humour
angles.copy: Still hilarious after all these years! 'The Producers' is on BBC Four tonight as a tribute to Mel Brooks turning 100 today. Don't miss it.

moments.title: July TV Premieres
moments.blurb: New TV series are set to premiere in early July, including Scottish thriller 'The Dark' and quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid'.

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for some fresh TV! Early July brings new series like the Scottish thriller 'The Dark' and the quirky BBC comedy 'Ann Droid'. What's on your watchlist?

angles.name: Scottish Thriller
angles.copy: A new Scottish thriller, 'The Dark', is among the July TV premieres! Get ready for twists and turns set in the beautiful, yet mysterious, Scottish wilderness.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A heatwave continues across parts of the UK, particularly England and Wales, with temperatures in the mid-30s, though fresher air is expected from the west this weekend.

angles.name: Weather Update
angles.copy: Stay cool out there! The heatwave continues today across parts of the UK, with temperatures in the mid-30s. Remember to hydrate and seek shade. #UKWeather

angles.name: Weekend Forecast
angles.copy: While temperatures remain high today, fresher air is on the way for parts of the UK this weekend. Keep an eye out for potential thunderstorms as the weather changes!

moments.title: Ian Paice (Deep Purple) is 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and founding member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday today, June 28.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice! His incredible rhythms have driven decades of rock anthems.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to Ian Paice of Deep Purple! A true legend behind the kit, still rocking hard.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger is 47
moments.blurb: Singer and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for her work with the Pussycat Dolls, turns 47 tomorrow, June 29.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Nicole Scherzinger turns 47 tomorrow. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track or one of her solo hits?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Eve
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 47th birthday! Send her your best wishes!

moments.title: Missy Elliott is 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Work it! Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st. Celebrate the hip-hop icon by blasting your favourite Missy tracks!

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Happy Birthday for July 1st to the incredible Missy Elliott! A true visionary in music, still inspiring generations.

moments.title: Debbie Harry is 81
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Call Me! Debbie Harry, the legendary frontwoman of Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday for July 1st to the one and only Debbie Harry! A true icon of music and style.

moments.title: Burna Boy is 34
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats, celebrates his 34th birthday on July 2.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday for July 2nd to the incredible Burna Boy! Get your Afrobeats playlist ready to celebrate the 'African Giant'!

angles.name: Global Music
angles.copy: Celebrating Burna Boy's 34th birthday on July 2nd! What a force in global music, constantly pushing boundaries.

moments.title: Shane Lynch (Boyzone) is 50
moments.blurb: Irish singer Shane Lynch, a member of the hugely successful boy band Boyzone, celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3.

angles.name: Boyband Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Boyzone's Shane Lynch turns 50 on July 3rd! What's your favourite Boyzone classic?

angles.name: Happy Half-Century
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 50th Birthday for July 3rd to Shane Lynch! Still a pop icon from the 90s.

moments.title: Post Malone is 31
moments.blurb: Multi-genre artist Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4.

angles.name: Birthday Cheers
angles.copy: Cheers to Post Malone, who turns 31 on July 4th! What's your go-to Posty anthem?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday for July 4th to Post Malone! From rap to rock, he does it all. Celebrate with his biggest hits!

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square! Huey Lewis turns 76 on July 5th. What's your favourite track from Huey Lewis & The News?

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 76th Birthday for July 5th to the legendary Huey Lewis! Still got 'The Power of Love' for this music icon.

moments.title: Scottish & NI School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays begin in Scotland on July 2 and Northern Ireland on July 1, marking the start of the main summer break.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: School's out for summer! ☀️ Summer holidays officially begin in Scotland on July 2nd and Northern Ireland on July 1st. Enjoy the break!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Planning your summer adventures? School holidays kick off next week in Scotland and Northern Ireland! Time for some family fun!
